(4 inline comments)

One issue that I had previously seen that was forgotten during the 2.3 review cycle is the use of "-M|--device" as part of the lfsck_{start,stop} options instead of using the --device option from lctl.  I filed LU-3588 for this so that it is not forgotten this time.  A few other minor fixes that could be done if patch is refreshed.

parents.subject: LU-3335 scrub: OI scrub on OST

commit.subject: LU-3335 scrub: control OI scrub on OST from user space
commit.message:
LU-3335 scrub: control OI scrub on OST from user space

Not all the OI inconsistency can be detected automatically, such as /O
entry lost case. So the OI scrub on OST should can be triggered by the
administrator manually.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-scrub
Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I9b23787b2fb14c8c93642462f9ebac948a181b70
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/6698
Tested-by: Hudson
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
